case_title: HOWARD EDELMAN VS. BANK OF AMERICA

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF EDELMAN, HOWARD IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,284.59 FILED BY EDELMAN, HOWARD AS TO DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-14-2015 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED NOV-09-2015, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF EDELMAN, HOWARD AS TO DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-14-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-14-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY ROBERT ESTILDO MANAGER--EMPLOYEE. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-14-2015 - JUDGMENT.
